raw_title: Book Review: ‘Villa Coco,’ by Andrew Sean Greer
description: Following his “Less” books with “Villa Coco,” Andrew Sean Greer drops an aimless postgraduate into a glamorous, romantic and secret-laden setting.

raw_title: Book Review: ‘The Man Who Stole the Gods,’ by Matthew Campbell
book_title: ‘The Man Who Stole the Gods,’ by Matthew Campbell
description: In “The Man Who Stole the Gods,” Matthew Campbell recounts a shocking, decades-long crime and the search for its perpetrator.
